abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single HA Card Game instance is supported.

user.title: Set up HA Card Game
user.description: Create the main card game entry and choose the default runtime behavior.

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid http or https URL.

remote.title: Remote access
remote.description: Optionally override the external URL used to generate player invite links.

data.ai_use_local_fallback: Use local fallback when AI is unavailable

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid http or https URL.

remote_players_without_base_url.title: Remote players enabled without a Home Assistant external URL
remote_players_without_base_url.description: Remote players are enabled, but HA Card Game could not determine an external URL for Home Assistant. Configure an external URL, Home Assistant Cloud, or a trusted VPN before inviting remote players.

ai_enabled_without_key_or_fallback.title: AI generation enabled without an API key or fallback
ai_enabled_without_key_or_fallback.description: AI generation is enabled, but no API key is configured and local fallback is disabled. Add an API key through the options flow or re-enable local fallback.

no_trivia_categories_enabled.title: No trivia categories are enabled
no_trivia_categories_enabled.description: Trivia is enabled, but no valid trivia categories are available. Reopen the options flow and enable at least one category.
